description_long: This is a modern, two-story house set within a walled property featuring a paved driveway, landscaped greenery, and a backyard with a swimming pool. The house has a flat roof and a minimalist white facade with large rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The front entryway is defined by a simple, flat overhang and a wide, paved approach, flanked by trees and a metal gate. The backyard includes a green lawn, poolside lounge chairs, and a rectangular swimming pool, all bordered by dense shrubbery for privacy. Multiple cars are parked in the driveway, indicating ample parking space. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor areas, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a paved driveway, landscaped greenery, and a backyard pool within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, paved driveway, metal gate, and trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, green lawn, and poolside lounge area.
description_view_2: Obstructed view with minimal visible details due to heavy shadow or occlusion.
description_view_3: Back view showing the pool, lawn, and rear facade of the house with large windows and surrounding greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flat overhang above a wide entry door, paved approach, flanked by trees and a metal gate
